title: jasminum humile f. wallichianum
intro: Jasminum humile f. wallichianum, also known as the Himalayan jasmine, is a fragrant, evergreen climbing shrub native to the Himalayan Mountains. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Himalayan jasmine include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Himalayan jasmine can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and essential oil, which are used to promote relaxation, ease pain, and soothe the nervous system.
